-- See Hoogle, http://www.haskell.org/hoogle/


-- | GHC primitives
--   
--   This package used to contain the primitive types and operations
--   supplied by GHC. They are now exported by the ghc-internal package and
--   ghc-prim is deprecated.
@package ghc-prim
@version 0.13.1
